prerequisites: An Encharge API key, obtained from the account info page at https://app.encharge.io/account/info.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Encharge authenticates requests with an API key (your account write key). Supply it in the connector's api_key field. Encharge accepts the key via the X-Encharge-Token request header or, alternatively, as a token query parameter.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Encharge
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Encharge account at https://app.encharge.io.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Open your account settings at https://app.encharge.io/account/info and copy your API key (the write key for your account).

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the connector's required api_key field. Encharge sends this value as the X-Encharge-Token header when authenticating API requests.

sources.title: Encharge Developers - Ingest API (write key location and X-Encharge-Token header)
Encharge Developers - Transactional Email API Authentication
